name: ChatGPT Images: New Generation With Attachment
description: Open ChatGPT Images in the current tab, upload one local file or image, send a prompt that defaults to two variations unless already specified, and return the resolved chat id for follow-up polling.

help.summary: Send a ChatGPT Images prompt with a local file/image attachment in the current tab. Defaults the prompt to request two variations when caller does not specify a count.

parameters.name: message_text
parameters.description: Prompt for the image generation. Variation count is auto-injected if not already mentioned.
parameters.example: Turn this sketch into a watercolor.

parameters.name: attachment_file_path
parameters.description: Absolute path to the local image or file to upload.

parameters.name: variation_count
parameters.description: How many variations to request when the prompt does not already specify a count. Defaults to 2.

examples.description: Two-variation watercolor render of a sketch
examples.command: rzn-browser run chatgpt images-new-generation-attachment-v1 --param message_text="Turn this sketch into a watercolor" --param attachment_file_path="/Users/me/sketch.png"

help.returns: Resolved chat URL and attachment metadata for downstream polling/render workflows.
notes: Caller must already be signed into ChatGPT in the active browser profile.
Uses CDP only for the upload_file step; the rest of the flow is JS-first.
If the prompt already mentions a count ("three variations", "4 options"), the auto-default is skipped.

browser_automation.description: Current-tab ChatGPT Images attachment flow. It reuses the authenticated browser session, prepares the file input, uploads a local image or file, sends the prompt, and returns the chat handle for downstream polling.

sequences.name: chatgpt_images_new_generation_attachment
sequences.description: Open ChatGPT Images -> prepare attachment input -> upload file -> send prompt -> return chat state.

required_variables.name: message_text
required_variables.description: Prompt text to send to ChatGPT Images

required_variables.name: attachment_file_path
required_variables.description: Absolute local path to a single image or file to upload before generation

steps.name: Open ChatGPT Images in the current tab
Allow the Images SPA shell to settle
Wait for the ChatGPT Images composer or thread shell
steps.selector: #prompt-textarea, textarea[placeholder*='Describe' i], textarea[placeholder*='Message' i], textarea[placeholder*='Send a message' i], form textarea, [data-message-author-role], main article

steps.name: Prepare the ChatGPT Images attachment input
Upload the attachment into the prepared file input
Allow the attachment chip to settle
Send the image generation prompt and return the chat state
